Dedicated header for M1's LoRa wireless module.
Main 24V power input and toggle switch connector.
Outputs for the 4 independent smart motor channels.
Energy storage inductors for the core 5V regulator and the four motor regulators.
Audio feedback transducer for user interface interaction.
The core actuation processor responsible for PWM motor control and reading the UI.
Q1 acts as the UVLO gate; Q2 drives the buzzer.
Current limiting resistors for the LEDs, base resistor for transistors.
Pull-up resistors for the tactile UI buttons and M1 reset, plus UVLO and voltage feedback nodes.

Series protection resistors for the four tactile UI buttons.
Feedback resistor parallel to the crystal to ensure stable oscillation.
Physical tactile buttons for local user interface (Set, Up, Down, Enter).
